instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that filters `articles` to those matching optional `query` substring in the title (case-insensitive), sorts nothing (preserve input order), paginates with `page`/`pageSize`, and shows an empty-state when the filtered slice is blank. Escape titles.
code:
<#-- Model: articles: [{ title }], query: string, page, pageSize --> <#assign term = (query!"")?lower_case> <#assign filtered = []> <#list articles![] as article> <#assign title = article.title!""> <#if !term?has_content || title?lower_case?contains(term)> <#assign filtered = filtered + [article]> <#assign pageNum = (page!1)?number> <#assign size = (pageSize!5)?number> <#assign offset = (pageNum - 1) * size>
    <#list filtered[offset..*size] as article>
  • ${article.title?html}
    • <#else>
  • No articles matched your search.
